arithmetic.description: Basic arithmetic operators and numeric functions

algebra.description: Algebraic manipulation: Solve, Factor, Expand, Simplify

statistics.description: Descriptive statistics, probability distributions, hypothesis tests

special_functions.description: Gamma, Bessel, elliptic, zeta and other special functions

list_ops.description: List construction and manipulation: Map, Select, Sort, Table

programming.description: Control flow, scoping, pure functions: If, Module, Block, Function

file_read.description: Read files from the local filesystem

file_write.description: Write or delete files on the local filesystem

networking.description: Fetch external URLs and open network sockets

system_exec.description: Execute operating system commands and external programs

dynamic_eval.description: Dynamically construct and evaluate arbitrary code

external_services.description: Connect to Wolfram Cloud and third-party services
